# Story 1.7: Frontend Shell — PWA + Design Tokens + Tailwind/shadcn + React Router v7

Status: done

<!-- Generated by BMad create-story workflow on 2026-05-10. Ultimate context engine analysis completed - comprehensive developer guide created. -->

## Story

As a developer,<br>
I want có khung frontend cơ bản với PWA registration, design tokens "warm café utility" làm CSS custom properties + Tailwind, shadcn/ui khởi tạo, và React Router v7 layout shell với routes `/login`, `/pos`, `/admin/*`,<br>
so that các stories FE auth/POS/Admin sau có nền tảng UI nhất quán theo UX spec và không phải refactor design tokens/routing/PWA shell.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. **PWA registration + manifest:** Given `pos-web` đã init từ Story 1.1, when developer mở `src/main.tsx`, then Service Worker registration qua `virtual:pwa-register/react` được setup với update prompt UI; `manifest.webmanifest` build ra có icon 192/512/maskable, name `Café POS`, short_name `POS`, `theme_color` và `background_color` theo design tokens; manual gate `npm run build` tạo `dist/sw.js` + manifest.
2. **Design tokens + Tailwind theme:** Given UX-DR1/2/3, when developer mở `src/styles/tokens.css` và Tailwind config, then CSS custom properties tồn tại đúng các giá trị: `--color-bg #F8F3EA`, `--color-surface #FFFFFF`, `--color-surface-muted #EFE4D3`, `--color-text-primary #241A14`, `--color-text-secondary #6F5A4A`, `--color-primary #6F3E1F`, `--color-primary-hover #5A321A`, `--color-accent #C47A2C`, `--color-success #2F7D4E`, `--color-warning #B7791F`, `--color-danger #B42318`, `--color-border #D8C7B6`; Tailwind theme exposes semantic names (`bg`, `surface`, `primary`, etc.), typography tokens (`--font-ui`, page-title/product-name/cart-item/body/secondary/total/cta), spacing 4/8/12/16/24/32px, min touch target 44px and CTA 48px+.
3. **shadcn/ui foundation:** Given shadcn/ui setup, when developer inspects repo, then `components.json` points aliases/components to `src/shared/components/ui/`; sample shadcn-compatible components `button`, `dialog`, `input` exist there; component styling consumes Tailwind tokens/CSS variables, not duplicated hardcoded hex values.
4. **React Router v7 route shell:** Given React Router v7 installed, when developer opens `src/App.tsx`, then data router (`createBrowserRouter` + `RouterProvider`) defines `/login` (`LoginPage` stub), `/pos` (POS shell stub), `/admin/*` (Admin shell stub with sectioned nav); root layout route uses `<Outlet />` and header with `ConnectivityIndicator` + `PendingCounter` stubs rendering `Online` and `0 đơn chờ`; `/admin/*` is code-split via `React.lazy()` or React Router lazy route.
5. **Responsive POS shell:** Given layout shell exists, when opening `/pos` at viewport `1024px+`, then user sees landscape-first two-column POS layout: product/menu placeholder left/main and fixed right cart/checkout placeholder; when viewport `<768px`, POS displays message `POS hoạt động tốt nhất ở màn hình ngang hoặc laptop/tablet` instead of pretending mobile POS is supported.
6. **Axios API client + problem mapping stub:** Given frontend shared lib exists, when developer opens `src/shared/lib/api-client.ts`, then axios instance has `baseURL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL`; request interceptor stub is clearly marked for Story 1.8 token wiring and does not read `localStorage/sessionStorage`; response interceptor detects `application/problem+json` and passes to `errorMapper` stub.
7. **Vietnamese status microcopy constants:** Given UX-DR31, when developer opens `src/shared/i18n/messages.ts`, then constants/functions define `STATUS_ONLINE = "Online"`, `STATUS_OFFLINE = "Offline — vẫn bán được"`, `STATUS_PENDING(n) = "{n} đơn chờ đồng bộ"`, `STATUS_SYNCING = "Đang đồng bộ"`, `STATUS_SYNCED = "Đã đồng bộ"`, `STATUS_FAILED = "Chưa đồng bộ được"`, `STATUS_MENU_UPDATED = "Menu đã cập nhật"`.
8. **Tests/gates:** Frontend tests cover at minimum router shell rendering `/login`, `/pos`, `/admin`, unsupported POS viewport message or layout semantics, status microcopy, and API problem mapper behavior. Required gates pass and are recorded: `cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build`.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Install/wire frontend shell dependencies (AC: 2, 3, 4, 6)
  - [x] Add runtime deps expected by story: `react-router-dom@7`, `axios`, Tailwind/shadcn/Radix support deps as generated by shadcn (`tailwindcss`, relevant Vite/Tailwind plugin or PostCSS config matching installed version, `class-variance-authority`, `clsx`, `tailwind-merge`, `lucide-react`, Radix primitives needed by dialog/input/button).
  - [x] Keep React at 18.x per architecture; do not upgrade to React 19 unless architecture is explicitly changed.
  - [x] Preserve existing Vite 7 + vite-plugin-pwa setup from Story 1.1; avoid replacing the starter with a new scaffold.
- [x] Implement design tokens and Tailwind/shadcn config (AC: 2, 3)
  - [x] Create `pos-web/src/styles/tokens.css` with warm café CSS custom properties, typography scale, spacing/touch-target variables, focus-ring variables, and base semantic styles.
  - [x] Update/create `tailwind.config.ts` and styling entrypoint so tokens are available as semantic Tailwind classes; keep class names meaningful (`bg-bg`, `bg-surface`, `text-text-primary`, `border-border`, etc.) or shadcn-compatible equivalents.
  - [x] Create/update `components.json` with aliases pointing `components`/`ui` to `src/shared/components/ui`, `lib` to `src/shared/lib`, and style compatible with current shadcn CLI output.
  - [x] Generate or hand-create shadcn-compatible `button.tsx`, `dialog.tsx`, `input.tsx` in `src/shared/components/ui/`; use tokens and `cn()` helper, no duplicated hex palette in components.
- [x] Replace Vite starter with router/layout shell (AC: 4, 5, 7)
  - [x] Replace `src/App.tsx` starter content with `createBrowserRouter` + `RouterProvider` and route objects for root, login, POS, admin.
  - [x] Add `src/routes/_layout.tsx` with app header, `<Outlet />`, `ConnectivityIndicator` and `PendingCounter` stubs.
  - [x] Add `src/routes/login/login-page.tsx` stub with Vietnamese placeholder copy and no real auth form yet (Story 1.8 owns auth flow).
  - [x] Add `src/routes/pos/pos-shell.tsx` with two-pane landscape POS placeholder and `<768px` unsupported message.
  - [x] Add `src/routes/admin/admin-shell.tsx` with sectioned nav placeholders: Menu (Categories/Products/Option Groups), Reports, Users/Sessions.
  - [x] Remove unused Vite starter assets/imports/styles from App if no longer referenced.
- [x] Implement PWA update prompt and manifest contract (AC: 1)
  - [x] Use `useRegisterSW` from `virtual:pwa-register/react` in a small component such as `src/shared/components/layout/pwa-update-prompt.tsx` or `main.tsx` provider area.
  - [x] Show non-blocking Vietnamese update prompt when `needRefresh` is true and offline-ready feedback when useful; keep it unobtrusive for POS.
  - [x] Update `vite.config.ts` PWA manifest to `name: "Café POS"`, `short_name: "POS"`, `theme_color: #6F3E1F`, `background_color: #F8F3EA`, display standalone, and icons with 192/512/maskable purpose.
  - [x] Ensure `npm run build` output includes `dist/sw.js` and manifest; do not commit `dist/` unless existing repo policy requires it.
- [x] Add shared API and microcopy foundations (AC: 6, 7)
  - [x] Create `src/shared/lib/api-client.ts` with axios instance and explicit Story 1.8 token-interceptor TODO that does **not** touch localStorage/sessionStorage.
  - [x] Create `src/shared/lib/error-mapper.ts` with typed `ProblemDetails` shape and safe default mapping; hide raw stack/detail from UI-facing message.
  - [x] Create `src/shared/i18n/messages.ts` with status strings/functions from UX-DR31.
  - [x] Create `src/shared/lib/cn.ts` helper for shadcn components if generated setup does not add one.
- [x] Add/refresh tests and docs (AC: 8)
  - [x] Replace old starter `App.test.tsx` assertions (`Get started`, `Count is`) with shell-specific tests.
  - [x] Add tests for route rendering, POS responsive/unsupported copy if practical in jsdom, messages, and error mapper.
  - [x] Update `pos-web/README.md` with shell routes, PWA behavior, and reminder that auth/token storage comes in Story 1.8.
  - [x] Run and record `cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build` in Dev Agent Record.

## Dev Notes

### Scope boundaries

- Story này chỉ tạo **frontend foundation/shell**: PWA registration prompt, manifest metadata, design tokens, Tailwind/shadcn foundation, React Router route stubs, shared API client stub, and status microcopy constants. Không implement login submit/token storage, Dexie session, axios bearer token wiring, role-based redirect, POS product grid real data, cart logic, sync engine, or Admin CRUD. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md#Story 1.7`]
- Story 1.8 owns auth flow, IndexedDB token storage, login page real form, and interceptor attaching Bearer token. This story must leave clear extension points without adding insecure temporary storage. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md#Story 1.8`; `_bmad-output/project-context.md#2-Quy-tắc-Bắt-buộc-Thi-hành`]
- Backend repo `pos-api/` should not be modified for this story.

### Current codebase state to modify/preserve

- `pos-web` currently still contains Vite starter UI in `src/App.tsx`, `src/App.css`, `src/index.css`, and test `src/App.test.tsx` asserts starter text. These are expected UPDATE files for this story; replace starter assumptions with POS shell assumptions. [Source: direct inspection `pos-web/src/App.tsx`, `pos-web/src/App.test.tsx`, `pos-web/src/index.css`]
- `pos-web/vite.config.ts` already uses `VitePWA` and builds a service worker, but manifest is still `pos-web`/white theme and icons are SVG-only without `purpose: maskable`. Update this config rather than adding a second PWA registration system. [Source: `pos-web/vite.config.ts`]
- `pos-web/package.json` currently only has React plus PWA/test tooling; it does not yet include React Router, axios, Tailwind, or shadcn-related deps. Add only frontend dependencies required for this shell. [Source: `pos-web/package.json`]
- `pos-web/public/` already has `pwa-192x192.svg`, `pwa-512x512.svg`, `favicon.svg`, `icons.svg`. If converting/adding PNG icons is not practical, keep SVG icons but set manifest sizes/type/purpose correctly; verify browser/build accepts them. [Source: repo tree]
- `.env.example` already defines the API base URL expected by `api-client.ts`; use `import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL`. [Source: `pos-web/README.md`; architecture API client requirement]

### Architecture compliance and developer guardrails

- Frontend import direction must be one-way: `routes/` → `features/<X>/` → `shared/` + `db/`; `features/` must not import each other; `shared/` must not import `features/` or `routes/`; `db/` only from features. In this shell, routes may import shared layout/UI/lib, but shared must remain route-agnostic. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md#Frontend Architecture`; `_bmad-output/project-context.md#Technology Stack & Versions`]
- Expected FE source tree includes `src/routes`, `src/features`, `src/shared/components/ui`, `src/shared/components/layout`, `src/shared/lib`, `src/shared/hooks`, `src/shared/stores`, `src/db`, and `src/styles`. Create only folders/files useful to this story; avoid empty placeholder sprawl beyond shell extension points. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md#Repo pos-web`]
- React Router must be v7 data-router style. Web research confirms `createBrowserRouter(routes)` expects a route tree up front for synchronous route matching/loaders, and can support lazy/code-split route modules. Use this instead of legacy `<BrowserRouter><Routes>`. [Source: web research `reactrouter.com/api/data-routers/createBrowserRouter`]
- PWA React registration should use vite-plugin-pwa virtual module. Web research confirms `virtual:pwa-register/react` exposes React stateful values such as `offlineReady` and `needRefresh` via `useRegisterSW`; use those for update prompt UI. [Source: web research `vite-plugin-pwa/docs/frameworks/react.md`]
- shadcn/ui for Vite is copy-paste component ownership. Configure aliases/components path to `src/shared/components/ui/` so later stories can add domain-specific wrappers without importing raw UI primitives everywhere. [Source: web research `ui.shadcn.com/docs/installation/vite`; architecture AR28]
- Code/comment language should be English where concise; UI-facing microcopy in Vietnamese. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#Locale & i18n`]

### Security and accessibility guardrails

- Never use `localStorage` or `sessionStorage` for token placeholders. If a TODO is needed, write it as a comment in interceptor stub; do not create temporary fallback storage. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#2-Quy-tắc-Bắt-buộc-Thi-hành`]
- Do not use `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`. CSP will be strict in architecture; components should be normal React/semantic HTML. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md#Xác-thực-&-Bảo-mật`; project-context Rule 8]
- Interactive stubs (header badges, nav links/buttons, update prompt buttons) should be semantic `<button>`, `<a>`, `<nav>`, `<header>`, `<main>` and keyboard focus-visible. Meet WCAG AA contrast for warm café tokens. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/ux-design-specification.md#Accessibility Considerations`; UX-DR34]
- Statuses must not rely only on color; render text labels like `Online` and `0 đơn chờ`. [Source: UX-DR31, UX-DR34]

### UX/design token requirements

- Warm café palette is fixed for this story: background `#F8F3EA`, surface `#FFFFFF`, surface muted `#EFE4D3`, text primary `#241A14`, text secondary `#6F5A4A`, primary `#6F3E1F`, primary hover `#5A321A`, accent `#C47A2C`, success `#2F7D4E`, warning `#B7791F`, danger `#B42318`, border `#D8C7B6`. Do not substitute shadcn default slate/zinc palette as the semantic source of truth. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/ux-design-specification.md#Visual Design Foundation`; UX-DR1]
- Typography: Inter first, fallback `system-ui, sans-serif`; page title 24–28 semibold, POS product name 16–18 semibold, cart item 15–16 semibold, body 14–16, secondary 12–14, total 28–36 bold, CTA 16–18 semibold, receipt 13–14; use tabular numbers for prices/totals where practical. [Source: UX-DR2]
- Spacing: 8px base with 4/8/12/16/24/32 tokens; touch target min 44px, preferred POS ProductTile/OptionChip/CTA 48–56px. [Source: UX-DR3]
- POS shell layout: landscape-first ≥1024px with product/category area left/main and fixed cart/checkout panel right; cart panel must not disappear at primary breakpoint. `<768px` shows unsupported message. [Source: UX-DR4, UX-DR36]

### Expected file structure changes

```text
pos-web/
├── components.json                         # NEW shadcn config
├── tailwind.config.ts                      # NEW/UPDATE if Tailwind version needs config
├── postcss.config.js or equivalent         # NEW if required by selected Tailwind setup
├── vite.config.ts                          # UPDATE PWA manifest
├── package.json/package-lock.json          # UPDATE deps
└── src/
    ├── main.tsx                            # UPDATE: import styles + render app; PWA prompt may live in layout
    ├── App.tsx                             # UPDATE: data router
    ├── App.test.tsx                        # UPDATE: shell tests
    ├── index.css / styles/*.css            # UPDATE/NEW: token/global styles
    ├── routes/
    │   ├── _layout.tsx                     # NEW
    │   ├── login/login-page.tsx            # NEW stub
    │   ├── pos/pos-shell.tsx               # NEW stub
    │   └── admin/admin-shell.tsx           # NEW stub, lazy-loaded
    └── shared/
        ├── components/layout/
        │   ├── connectivity-indicator.tsx  # NEW stub
        │   ├── pending-counter.tsx         # NEW stub
        │   └── pwa-update-prompt.tsx       # NEW
        ├── components/ui/
        │   ├── button.tsx                  # NEW shadcn-compatible
        │   ├── dialog.tsx                  # NEW shadcn-compatible
        │   └── input.tsx                   # NEW shadcn-compatible
        ├── i18n/messages.ts                # NEW
        └── lib/{api-client,error-mapper,cn}.ts # NEW
```

### Previous story intelligence

- Story 1.6 was backend-only and completed with full gates; it does not create frontend code. No FE patterns beyond repo starter exist yet, so this story establishes the first durable FE structure. [Source: `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-6-admin-session-revocation-endpoint.md`]
- Story 1.6 reinforced that Story 1.5 auth behavior is server-side complete. Frontend auth must wait for Story 1.8; this shell should not fake login or token persistence. [Source: previous story completion notes]
- Recent commits are backend feature commits (`feat(pos-api): ...`) with tests/gates. For this story, keep a similarly scoped FE foundation commit and record exact gate output. [Source: git log]

### Testing and verification requirements

- Required local gates before review:
  - `cd pos-web && npm run typecheck`
  - `cd pos-web && npm run lint`
  - `cd pos-web && npm test`
  - `cd pos-web && npm run build`
- Test suggestions:
  - render router with memory/history route or inspect route output for `/login`, `/pos`, `/admin` stubs;
  - assert `/pos` contains product placeholder, cart placeholder, and unsupported viewport copy;
  - assert `STATUS_PENDING(3)` returns `3 đơn chờ đồng bộ`;
  - assert `mapProblemDetails()` returns safe UI messages and preserves problem `type` for later action mapping;
  - build assertion/manual check: `test -f pos-web/dist/sw.js` after build if dist is generated locally (do not necessarily commit dist).
- If installing shadcn CLI generated files introduces lint format changes, keep generated code minimal and compliant with existing ESLint config.

### Open questions / caveats for developer

- The epics specifically say run `npx shadcn@latest init` and `add button dialog input`; in a non-interactive agent environment, generating equivalent files/config manually is acceptable if the output matches shadcn conventions and gates pass. Document which approach was used.
- shadcn/Tailwind documentation has shifted toward Tailwind v4. If using Tailwind v4, adapt config pattern accordingly while still satisfying the story’s explicit `tailwind.config.ts` semantic-token requirement if possible. If the installed toolchain generates CSS-first config only, explain the variance in Dev Agent Record and keep tokens available to Tailwind utilities.
- Existing public icons are SVG. If maskable PNG generation is out-of-scope, use SVG manifest entries with `purpose: "any maskable"`; if browser tooling warns, create simple PNG icons or document the blocker.
